creator: dan@math.berkeley.edu
text:
The following files are in the "des" release subdirectory but their
checksums are in the CHECKSUM.MD5 file in the "src" directory:

< MD5 (scrypto.aa) = 1780ee60e4590103fd1dc25c6787ffac
< MD5 (scrypto.ab) = 4ba080094c6f6a50c418335467f7b74a

< MD5 (skerbero.aa) = 89c370d1e9e5ab291fac696ae215ddaa
< MD5 (skerbero.inf) = 9595f1be544518b9f0d067448f6b59cf
< MD5 (ssecure.aa) = a563cb285858127362c613629db9d08c
< MD5 (ssecure.inf) = 4985813df313cec9ecf91792bacbbec2

the CHECKSUM.MD5 files:
